name: Docs Structure Guard
description: Ensures only README.md files are allowed in the root docs/ folder. All other markdown files must be in subdirectories.

then.prompt: A file was just created in the root docs/ folder. According to project rules, only README.md is allowed in docs/. All other documentation files must be placed in appropriate subdirectories (architecture/, features/, guides/, reference/, implementation/, fixes/, research/, status/, planning/, foundation/). Please move this file to the correct subdirectory or inform the user if it's README.md.
